name: Sponge Cake/Diabetic
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Liquid sweetener (equal to 1 cup sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use unsweetened pineapple juice.
2. Mix together the egg yolks, flour, pineapple juice, vanilla, pineapple flavoring, orange flavoring, sweetener, and salt in a bowl until stiff but not dry.
3. Beat the egg whites and baking powder separately.
4. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beaten egg white mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 55 minutes, or until set.
7. Invert the cake onto a plate and let it cool in the pan.
8. Cut into 20 slices. Each slice equals 1 bread exchange.
